name: Vagabond Gingered Ale
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lb Munton & Fison plain dark malt extract
3 oz Freshly grated ginger root (adjust to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed crystal and chocolate malts with 1.5 gallons of cold water.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then remove the grains.
3. Add the malt extracts. Do not leave the grains in boiling water to avoid an "ashy" taste.
4. Dissolve the extracts completely.
5. Add the boiling hops and freshly grated ginger root; continue boiling for 60 minutes.
6. Finish by adding the Willamette hops during the last 1-2 minutes of boiling.
7. Sparge the fermenter with cold water.
8. Cool the mixture, pitch the yeast, and bottle once fermentation is finished.
Source: Charlie Papazian, "The New Complete Joy to Homebrewing"
